definition: The process of testing, adjusting and preparing a machine, system or production line for normal operation.
examples: I supported the commissioning of the new production line by testing the PLC program, checking all safety devices and verifying robot communication.
The commissioning process was delayed because one of the robots failed the safety check.
During commissioning, we tested every sensor and actuator before starting automatic production.

definition: The process of adjusting and checking a measuring device or system to ensure accurate results.
examples: The vision system requires calibration before the camera can measure the part accurately.
We performed a new TCP calibration after replacing the robot welding torch.
Incorrect calibration caused a small difference between the actual and measured positions.

definition: Not staying the same in quality, performance or behavior over time.
examples: The sensor produced inconsistent readings during the production test.
Inconsistent weld quality may indicate unstable process parameters.
The robot movement became inconsistent because the fixture was not properly secured.

definition: A signal that appears and disappears irregularly instead of remaining stable.
examples: The proximity sensor generated an intermittent signal because the cable was damaged.
We monitored the PLC input to identify the source of the intermittent signal.
An intermittent signal caused the machine to stop several times during the shift.

definition: A period when a machine, system or production line is not operating.
examples: Preventive maintenance helped reduce unplanned downtime on the production line.
The damaged sensor caused thirty minutes of downtime during the night shift.
The engineering team analyzed the fault to prevent further downtime.

definition: Greater than what is normal, necessary or acceptable.
examples: Excessive vibration may damage the motor bearings over time.
The inspection system detected excessive sealant on the surface of the part.
Excessive welding current can cause spatter and poor weld quality.
